evidence.content: {"aliases": ["Alarm effect", "Alarm-induced arrest", "Alarm with immediate shutdown"], "synonyms": ["alarm", "warning", "alert", "immediate arrest", "instant shutdown", "sudden halt", "control", "regulation", "management"], "lexical_variants": ["Alarm causing immediate arrest and control", "Alarm leading to immediate arrest and control", "Alarm that triggers immediate arrest and control"], "definition": "An alarm state that triggers an immediate halt of machine operation and initiates control actions within a manufacturing environment.", "ontology_hints": ["FeatureOfInterest", "ManufacturingCell", "ManufacturingFacility", "Instant", "requires action", "TRIGGERS"]}
